title: Triumph (disambiguation)
content:
'''''Triumph''''' could refer to either of these ships:
*[[Triumph (Victory-class)|''Triumph'']], probably a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]
*[[Triumph (Acclamator-class)|''Triumph'']], an ''Acclamator''-class assault ship
*[[Triumph (Marauder-class)|''Triumph'']], a ''Marauder''-class corvette
*[[Triumph (corvette group)|''Triumph'']], a group of two [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]]
*[[Triumph (Strike-class)|''Triumph'']], a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]].
*[[Triumph (Theta-class T-1 vessel)|''Triumph'']], [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane's]] [[Theta-class T-1 vessel|''Theta''-class T-1 vessel]]
*[[Triumph-class|''Triumph''-class]], a model of transport used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]
===See also===
*''[[Bureaucrat's Triumph]]''
*[[Arch of Triumph]]
*[[Triumph (painting)|''Triumph'']], a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] painting
